feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Superpackage ZCUSTOM_DEVELOPMENT is not a valid package
entry.content:
Dear Community,

Using the Developer Extensibility model, we created several custom objects. At the start of development, the structure package ZCUSTOM_DEVELOPMENT was not available in the TDD system (Partner Demo Development Tenant), so we used the structure package ZPARTNER and completed the development.

Now, while preparing to transport these objects to QA, we are encountering the error: “Software component of transport is inconsistent.” The ZPARTNER package currently has no transport layer assigned.

Since the ZCUSTOM_DEVELOPMENT structure package is now available, I attempted to move our development packages under it. However, this results in the error: “Superpackage ZCUSTOM_DEVELOPMENT is not a valid package.”

What options are available to move these objects to the QA system?

Regards,
Karthik

entry.title: Adding new item to an existing PO failing with I_PUCHASEORDERTP_2 in S/4Hana Cloud
entry.content:
Hello All,

I have a requirement where i have to add new items with cost center to an existing PO. I am using below code. 
NOTE : ls_po_num-purchaseorderbycustomer has PO number that i want to update.
              ls_po_item-accountassignmentnumber has the last acc asst number.
              GL Account is fetched automatically by the system in the backend.

  DATA(lv_acc_no) = ls_po_item-accountassignmentnumber.
    LOOP AT lt_vbap_temp ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<ls_vbap>).
      lv_acc_no = lv_acc_no + 1.
      DATA(lv_cid)  = |{ cv_itmcid }{ lv_acc_no }|.
      DATA(lv_cid1) = |{ cv_itmacc }{ lv_acc_no }|.

      APPEND INITIAL LINE TO lt_purchase_order_item ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<ls_poi>).

      <ls_poi>-%tky-purchaseorder = ls_po_num-purchaseorderbycustomer.
      <ls_poi>-%target = VALUE #( BASE <ls_poi>-%target ( %cid = lv_cid
                                 material                  = <ls_vbap>-material
                                 plant                     = <ls_vbap>-plant
                                 orderquantity             = <ls_vbap>-ordqty
                                 purchaseorderquantityunit = <ls_vbap>-purchaseorderquantityunit
                                 purchaseorderitem         = <ls_vbap>-purchaseorderitem
                                 netpriceamount            = <ls_vbap>-netpriceamount
                                 documentcurrency          = <ls_vbap>-documentcurrency
                                 accountassignmentcategory = <ls_vbap>-accassigncat

                                 %control = VALUE #( material = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
                                                     plant = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
                                                     orderquantity = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
                                                     purchaseorderquantityunit = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
                                                     purchaseorderitem = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
                                                     netpriceamount = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
                                                     documentcurrency = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
                                                     accountassignmentcategory = if_abap_behv=>mk-on )
                                   ) ).

      APPEND INITIAL LINE TO lt_po_acc_assign ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<ls_acc>).
      <ls_acc>-%cid_ref = lv_cid.
      <ls_acc>-%tky-PurchaseOrder = ls_po_num-purchaseorderbycustomer.
      <ls_acc>-%tky-purchaseorderitem = <ls_vbap>-purchaseorderitem.
      <ls_acc>-%target = VALUE #( BASE <ls_acc>-%target ( %cid = lv_cid1
                                                          purchaseorderitem = <ls_vbap>-purchaseorderitem
                                                          accountassignmentnumber = lv_acc_no
                                                          costcenter = <ls_vbap>-costcenter
                                                          wbselementexternalid = <ls_vbap>-wbselement
                                                          "GLAccount = <ls_vbap>-glaccount

                                      %control = VALUE #( purchaseorderitem = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
                                                          accountassignmentnumber = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
                                                          costcenter = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
                                                          glaccount = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
                                                          wbselementexternalid = if_abap_behv=>mk-on )
                                   ) ).


    ENDLOOP.

    MODIFY ENTITIES OF i_purchaseordertp_2
        ENTITY PurchaseOrder
        CREATE BY \_purchaseorderitem FROM lt_purchase_order_item
        ENTITY purchaseorderitem
        CREATE BY \_purordaccountassignment FROM lt_po_acc_assign
        REPORTED FINAL(ls_reported)
        FAILED FINAL(ls_failed)
        MAPPED FINAL(ls_mapped).

    IF ls_failed-purchaseorder IS NOT INITIAL.
      LOOP AT ls_reported-purchaseorder ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<ls_reported_po>).
        RAISE SHORTDUMP TYPE zcx_bc_message_wrapper
          USING MESSAGE.
      ENDLOOP.
    ENDIF.

While using this code i am continuously getting error " Numbering of child object does not match parent object (&1)." in ls_reported, only for PurchaseOrderItem - item 00030.

How can i solve this error.

BR.
Tushar

entry.title: API Journal Entry-Clearing (asynchronous) the interface call failed;
entry.content:
Question:SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
Calling SOAP Journal Entry-Clearing (asynchronous) API, how to pass in parameters in ABAP Development Tools, and the interface call failed? The call attempts the following three ways, all of which report errors, as follows:
Situation 1:
Use standard SAP_COM_0002, and use service _ id: journalentryBulkclearingrequest _ in.
Error in calling asynchronous SOAP interface: The communication protocol does not exist.

1-11-2Situation 2:
Use standard SAP_COM_0002, and use service _ id: journalentryburkclearningquestions _ webi.
Error in calling asynchronous SOAP interface: The communication protocol does not exist.

Situation 3：
Use standard SAP_COM_0002 and service _ id: co _ fins _ journal _ entry _ bulk _ cle _ sprx. Error in calling asynchronous SOAP interface: Logical port does not belong to consumer agent.

entry.title: S/4Hana Cloud Public Edition OData Api Rate Limits
entry.content: Does anybody here know the rate limits of the odata APIs provided by S/4Hana Cloud Public Edition? Our customer needs those rate limits for documentation purposes and for technical architecture decision making.

entry.title: Updating Production Order Component Quantity as per Batch from Custom App to SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are working with Custom Application (using RAP Application) in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, where Batch wise line items are created with fields such as Batch, Quantity, Unit of measurement , Plant, Material, Storage Location, Backflush Indicator, Material Category, & Sequence Category.

Our requirement is to update these line items in the Component tab of the Production Order in the standard SAP Public Cloud system.

In other words, each Batch wise line item created in the Custom Application should get populated in a corresponding component tab in the Production Order.

We explored the CDS view I_ProductionOrderOpComponentTP, but as it is not a root view, we are unable to perform transactional updates using EML (Entity Manipulation Language) for transactional updates.

Below is the field mapping for reference

 

CDS View FieldCustom App Field
RequiredQuantityQuantity
BaseUnitUOM
BatchBatch
PlantPlant
MaterialProduct
BillOfMaterialItemNumberLine Item Number
StorageLocationMRM1'
MatlCompIsMarkedForBackflush'X'
BillOfMaterialItemCategoryL'
SequenceCategory                          '0'


We would like to know if there is any available BAdI, API, or transactional CDS view that can be used to achieve this requirement.

Best Regards,

Thank you.

entry.title: How to Enable Translations for RAP-based Fiori Apps in S/4HANA Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I have created a Fiori application using the RAP Generator and deployed it in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.

Now, I’m trying to maintain translations (for example, Italian) so that the app UI, labels, and catalog texts adapt based on the user’s logon language.

Could anyone guide me on the recommended way to handle translations for RAP-based Fiori apps in S/4HANA Public Cloud?

Any insights, best practices, or documentation references would be really helpful.

Thanks in advance!

Regards,

Jagadhatri

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition  SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Extensibility

entry.title: Business Partner Not Created via EML – The issue has been resolved
entry.content:
We are trying to create a Business Partner using EML (Entity Manipulation Language) with the standard interface view i_businesspartnertp_3.

The implementation executes without any runtime errors, and both FAILED and FAILED_COMMIT structures are initial. However, the Business Partner is not created in the system.

 

CLASS zcl_businessobject DEFINITION
PUBLIC
FINAL
CREATE PUBLIC .

PUBLIC SECTION.

INTERFACES if_oo_adt_classrun .
PROTECTED SECTION.
PRIVATE SECTION.
ENDCLASS.




CLASS zcl_businessobject IMPLEMENTATION.


METHOD if_oo_adt_classrun~main.


DATA create_partner TYPE TABLE FOR CREATE i_businesspartnertp_3.
create_partner = VALUE #( (
%cid = 'bp1'
businesspartnercategory = '1'
%control-businesspartnercategory = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
lastname = 'Test_BP5'
%control-lastname = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
) ).
MODIFY ENTITIES OF i_businesspartnertp_3
ENTITY businesspartner
CREATE FROM create_partner
CREATE BY \_businesspartneraddress
FIELDS ( country cityname ) WITH VALUE #( (
%cid_ref = 'bp1'
%target = VALUE #(
(
%cid = 'bp1_1'
country = 'IN'
cityname = 'Bangalore'
)
)
) )
MAPPED DATA(mapped)
REPORTED DATA(reported)
FAILED DATA(failed).
COMMIT ENTITIES
RESPONSE OF i_businesspartnertp_3
FAILED DATA(failed_commit)
REPORTED DATA(reported_commit).
IF failed_commit IS NOT INITIAL.
out->write( |Error| ).
ELSE.
out->write( |Socio de negocio creado correctamente.| ).
ENDIF.


ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

entry.title: S/4HANA Cloud Public – Display account assignment description in PO factsheet (My Inbox)
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am working on SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and I have a question regarding Purchase Order approval via My Inbox.

In the approval process, when opening a Purchase Order from the My Inbox app (factsheet view), at item level I can see the account assignment (e.g. Cost Center / WBS element), but only the code is displayed.

My requirement is to display the description (e.g. Cost Center name or WBS description) in addition to or instead of the code, directly in the PO factsheet accessed from My Inbox.

Constraints:

  • S/4HANA Cloud Public (clean core)

  • Standard factsheet UI (no key user adaptation available in this context)

  • The field is standard (account assignment), not a custom field

Any guidance or experience would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Inquiry Storage/Usage Space in SAP S/4 Hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear All,

 

I would like to inquire where I can check the storage or system usage space in SAP S/4Hana Public Cloud.

Cloud you please advise which application or path I should use to monitor this information?

Thank you for your support.

 

Regards,

Keratiya D.

entry.title: CA_OC_OUTPUT_REQUEST_SRV S4 Public Cloud
entry.content: I want to consume CA_OC_OUTPUT_REQUEST_SRV in S4 Public Cloud but I am getting authorisation error while fetching items. How do I provide required authorisation or does any know communication arrangement for this service .

entry.title: Implementing Custom Logic to Include Project Information in Billing Email Template
entry.content:
Team,

We are currently working on a business scenario similar to the one described in the following SAP documentation:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_EXTENSIBILITY_EXPLORER/397bf26514884cc8a5ece65970e8e3e6/3f898d6f59254ef497f00c78423cec7a.html?locale=en-US&version=LATEST

Our business requirement is to include Event ID / Event Description (Project ID / Project Description) in the invoice email template that is sent to our customers.

We have followed the implementation steps described in the SAP documentation. However, we are currently facing difficulties at Step 4 of the implementation.

According to the documentation, we need to create a new custom logic (for example, Project Info in Billing Email Template) in the Sales: Sales Document business context using BAdI Sales Header Modification.

However, the current version of the Custom Fields and Logic app requires us to select both:

  • Business Context

  • Business Object Node

    In order to determine the extension points where the logic should be implemented.

    We were able to select Business Context: "Sales: Sales Document", but we are unsure which extension point should be selected to implement the logic for the custom field "Customer Project ID".

    When selecting this business context, the system displays 23 different extension points, and it is unclear which one should be used for this scenario.

    Could you please advise which specific extension point should be selected so that we can implement the custom logic to populate the Customer Project ID field for use in the billing email template?

    For your reference, we have attached a screenshot showing the available extension points after selecting the Sales: Sales Document business context.

    Please note that this field is very important for our business, as the Project ID / Project Description must be visible in the invoice email template sent to customers. Therefore, any guidance on the correct extension point and implementation approach would be greatly appreciated.

    We kindly request your support in resolving this issue at the earliest convenience.

entry.title: Cannot select a system in BAS when creating an Adaptation project in S/4 Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi! As the subject says, I am encountering an error saying Authentication Error: in SAPUI5 Adaptation Project in our BTP BAS.

 

I have created a destination for our S/4 Public Cloud using Basic Authentication only and have verified that I am able to connect properly via curl command:

Do you guys have also encountered this? Maybe I'm missing something, let me know and any assistance will do!

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA SAP Business Application Studio

entry.title: DELIVERYDATEQUANTITYISFIXED not available in Incoming Sales Orders - Flexible Analysis
entry.content: For analytics reasons (delivery goals) we need the field DELIVERYDATEQUANTITYISFIXED to be selectable as "Available Fields" in App "Incoming Sales Orders - Flexible Analysis". DELIVERYDATEQUANTITYISFIXED (delivery date and quantity is fixed) is part of CDS Views "I_SALESDOCUMENTITEM", from which a lot of other fields are availible to select in the App already - but this is missing. Is there a away to add Fields from this CDS View?

entry.title: Situation Handling for Journal Entry Posting – Triggering Issue with CL_FINS_JOURNALENTRY_SOT_EVENT
entry.content:
SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance Situation Handling 

Dear experts,

I am working with Situation Handling in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud and have a requirement to notify specific users via Fiori notification or email when a Journal Entry is posted, specifically based on criteria such as specific G/L accounts or Journal Entry Types.

I have completed the configuration for the following components:

  • Responsibility Management: Team and functions defined.

  • Situation Object / Scenario / Type: Configured and enabled the Situation Type.

However, despite these settings, the situation is not triggering as expected. When checking the Monitor Situations app and Application Logs, there is no evidence of any instance being created or any error logs being generated.

In my technical investigation, I am focusing on the anchor object class CL_FINS_JOURNALENTRY_SOT_EVENT. However, it is unclear exactly how or when this class is triggered within the Public Cloud environment.

My questions are:

  1. Triggering Mechanism: Does the ABAP event class CL_FINS_JOURNALENTRY_SOT_EVENT trigger the situation in real-time immediately upon Journal Entry posting (Save event)? Or does it require a background job scheduled via the "Schedule Situation Handling Jobs" app?

  2. Standard Workaround or Recommended Approach: Is there a specific standard Situation Scenario or Job Template recommended for triggering notifications based on Journal Entry attributes in Public Cloud?

  3. Known Limitation by Design: Is the direct triggering of situations from the Journal Entry posting event a known limitation in the current version of SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud?

The goal is to inform relevant stakeholders immediately when a specific posting occurs using the standard Situation Handling framework, avoiding custom BAdI developments where possible.

Any guidance, best practices, or confirmation regarding the behavior of this specific class and situation object would be greatly appreciated.

Regards,
M. Kitakatsu

entry.title: MASS UPLOAD AND POST GR/IR IN SAP S/4HANA PUBLIC CLOUD
entry.content: I have brought in material inventory balance for initial stock as at December 2025, I want to do mass GR/IR for the products to properly capture the goods movement that have happened from January 2026 to February 2026 so as to have an accurate balance

entry.title: Mass upload of customer and supplier bank details in SAP public cloud
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Do we have any option SAP Public cloud to mass upload of customer and supplier bank details. Actually both supplier and customer BP master data already there in the Production System. Now only need to update payment details in Payment transaction tab of BP. 

Please suggest.

Thanks

Naga.

entry.title: S/4HANA Cloud Public: availability check before posting order confirmation / avoiding COGI
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

We are integrating an external MES (Digital Manufacturing Platform) with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

Today we post production order confirmations via API_PROD_ORDER_CONFIRMATION_2_SRV.
During confirmation, SAP performs an availability check for component backflush/consumption. If stock is missing, the confirmation can fail and can lead to failed goods movements / postprocessing (COGI).

Goal: Before sending the confirmation, we want to run a “live” check on SAP side for the exact component list and quantities that we intend to consume, so that we can:

  • retrieve which components are short (and by how much),
  • show clear messages in our UI,
  • block the confirmation or submit it without goods movements (depending on business decision),
  • avoid creating postprocessing/COGI records.

Our proposed flow

  1. Read production order + components from SAP
  2. In MES user enters proposed output + component consumption quantities
  3. Call SAP to validate component availability for that proposal (same logic as confirmation availability check)
  4. SAP returns available quantities / shortages / messages
  5. MES shows the errors and blocks posting (or adjusts)
  6. If OK, MES sends the confirmation to SAP

Questions

  1. Is there a released API in S/4HANA Cloud Public to run an availability check for components (similar to the check done during production order confirmation / backflush)?
    • Ideally: input = Material, Plant, Storage Location, Batch (batch-managed materials), required quantity, date/time
    • output = available qty, shortage qty, message text (or message id/variables)
  2. If not, what is the SAP-recommended approach?
    • Would using API_MATERIAL_STOCK_SRV (stock snapshot by material/plant/sloc/batch) be the recommended workaround, even if it doesn’t fully reflect the same confirmation logic?
  3. We found the CDS view I_FailedGoodsMovementItem (VDM) which seems to represent failed goods movements (COGI-like records).
    • Is it supported/recommended in Public Cloud to build a custom CDS view on top of it and expose it as a custom OData API to read error records?
    • If yes, can you confirm the high-level steps (Custom CDS View → Publish as API → Communication Scenario/Arrangement)?
    • Also, is there a standard way to retrieve the message long text (error text) for each failed item via released associations/fields?

Any guidance on the best practice for this scenario would be appreciated.

Thanks!

entry.title: Approval Workflow Supplier Invoice add Custom fields
entry.content:
Hello there lovely Community, 

We are using Approval workflows for Supplier invoices. Id like to adjsut the view for the myinbox app. More precise : id like to add a custom field to the view. 

I did that once for Purchase Orders: Here i did reaserch a deeplink to a Purchase order display deeplink app and added a customer field there -> also showed in my inbox. 

But for supplier invocie im Struggling at the moment.  

Anyone got a good idea?

 

 

kind regards, 

Philipp

entry.title: Request for CDS View Combining Outbound Delivery and Freight Order Data (Similar to VL06O App)
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team, 

We require a CDS view that provides a consolidated dataset combining Outbound Delivery and Freight Order information, similar to the data visibility available in the Manage Outbound Deliveries (VL06O) application. 

Business Requirement:
We will have to Print Collective Picking List and summary gate pass output forms. For those cases, a freight reight order will be the reference document for collective picking and a summary gate pass.

Questions / Request:

  1. Is there any standard CDS View available that combines Outbound Delivery and Freight Order data?
  2. If not, could you suggest the relevant standard CDS Views / tables and associations to build a custom CDS View?
  3. Are there any SAP Notes or best practices for replicating VL06O-like data in CDS?

We appreciate your guidance on achieving this requirement using standard SAP capabilities.

Thanks
Hasnat

entry.title: Creating Production Order Component Line Items via API
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

We are currently working on a Custom Application Developed using the RAP (RESTful ABAP Programming) model in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, where Batch wise line items are being managed.

As part of our requirement, we are using the A_ProductionOrderComponent_4 API to update values in the CO02 Production Order screen. However, this API does not fully meet our needs.

At present, when using the PATCH method, we are only able to modify existing line items and are unable to create new ones.

Our requirement is to create new line items in the Production Order Component along with the corresponding batch details. We would like to understand if there is any POST method or appropriate API available to support this functionality. Alternatively, we would appreciate any recommendations for a suitable approach to achieve this requirement.

Thank you,

Production order Component line Item
